## Problem

When a referral payment is approved and committed to the wallet, the Stripe Transfer is
created with creation-time metadata only — approval-time fields such as
`platform_transaction_type: referral_reward` and platform fee details are never recorded
on the transfer.

This makes referral transactions indistinguishable from other transfer types in the Stripe
dashboard and omits fee details that are recorded for review cashback transactions.

### Root cause

`wallet_bridge.commit_wallet_transaction` called `provider.commit_inflight(transaction_id)`
without forwarding the `meta_data` argument. Inside `StripeWalletProvider.commit_inflight`,
only `pending.meta_data` (baked in at creation time) was used to build the Stripe Transfer
metadata, so approval-time enrichments were silently dropped.

For BLNK: the commit endpoint does not accept metadata, so metadata must be updated via a
separate API call before committing. Previously, no such call was made for referral payments.

## Fix

- `WalletProvider.commit_inflight` / `NullWalletProvider` — add `meta_data` kwarg to abstract contract
- `wallet_bridge.commit_wallet_transaction` — forward `meta_data` to `provider.commit_inflight`
- `StripeWalletProvider.commit_inflight` — merge approval-time `meta_data` into `transfer_meta`
  before Stripe Transfer creation; persist merged metadata to the DB row
- `BlnkWalletProvider.commit_inflight` — accept (and ignore) `meta_data` kwarg; BLNK path uses
  separate pre-commit metadata update
- `LocalWalletProvider.commit_inflight` — merge `meta_data` into row before status flip
- `referrals.approve_referral_payment` — add `platform_transaction_type: referral_reward` to
  referral metadata; call BLNK metadata update before commit when provider is BLNK

## Files changed

- `backend/app/services/wallet_provider.py`
- `backend/app/services/wallet_bridge.py`
- `backend/app/services/wallet_blnk.py`
- `backend/app/services/wallet_local.py`
- `backend/app/services/wallet_stripe.py`
- `backend/app/services/referrals.py`
- `backend/tests/test_referral_payments.py`
